global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a focus on a promotional message and call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a simple and secure signup for a card service.

elements.label: SwiftStack logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'SwiftStack' in a bold font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Secure & simple message
elements.description: A prominent text block stating 'Secure & simple' in a large, clear font, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Fast signup details
elements.description: Smaller text below the main message that reads 'Fast signup, instant card', providing additional information.

elements.label: Price display
elements.description: A bold text displaying the price '€9.99', centered and visually distinct to attract attention.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A button-like text saying 'Try for free', designed to encourage user interaction, positioned below the price.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: A solid color background that is warm and inviting, providing a cohesive backdrop for the text elements.
elements.text_content: Secure & simple Fast signup instant card €9.99 Try for free

elements.label: SwiftStack logo
elements.description: A small logo at the top left corner, featuring the brand name 'SwiftStack' in a simple, modern font.
